codeReview.summary: SkillTool adapter and ancestor-walk skill discovery correctly implemented. SkillTool wraps skill definitions as Tool trait objects, SkillDiscovery walks from start_path upward finding .swell/skills/ directories with nearest skills taking precedence. register_skills_from_workspace wires skills into ToolRegistry at Plugin layer. All 8 unit tests pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention violations found. Implementation follows existing crate patterns: async-trait for Tool trait, proper error handling via SwellError::ToolExecutionFailed, use of tracing for debug/info/warn logs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skill.rs uses #[async_trait] impl Tool, returns SwellError on failures, uses tracing::{debug, info, warn}

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used rust-worker skill as expected. No skillFeedback deviations noted in handoff.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows: Tool: Skill { skill: 'rust-worker' }

sharedStateObservations.observation: No services started that should be documented. Worker only ran cargo test/build/clippy which are standard crate validation commands documented in AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows cargo test -p swell-tools, cargo clippy -p swell-tools, cargo fmt

summary: Implementation passes review. SkillTool adapter correctly wraps skill definitions as Tool trait objects. Ancestor-walk discovery properly searches .swell/skills/ directories from start_path upward with nearest precedence. Skills registered at Plugin layer via register_skills_from_workspace(). 8 unit tests cover core functionality (skill tool name/description/execute, ancestor walk, precedence, frontmatter parsing, keyword extraction). All tests pass. No blocking issues found.
